assertions.reason: Validated one-router-fail/other-success behavior: Spandex quote rendered while Curve showed an error tab/message.
evidence: Playwright DOM snapshot showed tabs Spandex/Curve with Curve error text: 'Curve failed: No route found for test pair'.
Real endpoint check via curl: /compare-stream emitted curve error + spandex quote + complete(recommendation=spandex).

assertions.reason: Validated both-fail behavior: combined error message included both Spandex and Curve failures and loading state cleared.
evidence: UI text showed: 'No quotes available. Spandex: ... Curve: ...' with results finalized (no loading indicator).
Real endpoint check via curl: /compare-stream emitted both error events then complete(recommendation=null).

assertions.reason: Validated stale-stream cancellation: starting comparison B while A streamed resulted in only B data rendering; late A data did not appear.
evidence: Playwright evaluate result after A->B rapid submits: hasNewReason=true, hasOldReason=false, hasNewSpandexValue=true, hasNewCurveValue=true, hasOldSpandexValue=false, hasOldCurveValue=false.
Final UI reason text: 'NEW comparison amount=2 complete'.

frictions: Playwright MCP EventSource handling intermittently produced 'Failed to connect to quote stream' despite 200 /compare-stream responses; used deterministic EventSource mocking/interception for progressive-flow assertions.
15s auto-refresh can race assertion timing and switch views mid-capture; explicitly stopped auto-refresh before taking final evidence screenshots.
